content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Mon, 16 Feb 2026 00:50:13 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 214 | Critical: 72 | High: 33 | Medium: 17 | Low: 92

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [NUCLEAR] Nuclear reactors at March base head for Utah in a first - of - its - kind airlift (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran FM arrives in Switzerland for nuclear talks with US (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Trump told Netanyahu he would support strikes on Iran missiles , sources say (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Israel bombs Lebanon-Syria border, kills four people (Al Jazeera)
  [MIDDLE EAST] At least 11 Palestinians killed in Israeli attacks across Gaza (Al Jazeera)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (47 events, 26 critical, 10 high):
    - Iran FM arrives in Switzerland for nuclear talks with US
    - Trump told Netanyahu he would support strikes on Iran missiles , sources say
    - Israel bombs Lebanon-Syria border, kills four people
  Ukraine/Russia (7 events, 2 critical, 2 high):
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
    - How Russia’s Invasion is Impacting Ukraine’s Youth
    - Why Russia’s Export Failures Matter For India
  Europe (39 events, 13 critical, 4 high):
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
    - Motorway collapses as deadly storms hit France, Portugal and Spain
  Indo-Pacific (36 events, 3 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (9 events, 2 critical, 4 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US military boards another oil tanker in Indian Ocean after tracking it from the Caribbean
  Global (54 events, 14 critical, 8 high):
    - ‘People want to help’: Canadians rally round Tumbler Ridge after school shooting
    - New Zealand officials warn more flooding could hit north island as man killed after heavy rain
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source

Sources: GDELT, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, BBC World, The Guardian, NYT World, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC Africa, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, BBC Asia, The Diplomat
